description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a flat roof and two prominent chimneys. The structure features a covered front porch with decorative white railings and columns, as well as a smaller covered porch at the rear. The front facade is adorned with ornate trim above the entryway and bay windows, giving it a touch of Victorian influence. Windows are symmetrically arranged on the long sides, with white framing that contrasts against the red brick exterior. The roofline is simple and flat, with minimal overhangs, and the house sits elevated above ground level with steps leading to the main entrance. The overall design suggests a historic urban row house, commonly found in older city neighborhoods.
description: A two-story red brick house with a flat roof, ornate front porch, and symmetrical window arrangement. Features decorative trim, white railings, and both front and rear covered porches.
description_view_0: Shows the long side of the house with three windows, the rear porch, and the flat roof with two chimneys.
description_view_1: Highlights the rear porch, side windows, and the full length of the flat roof, with the front porch partially visible.
description_view_2: Displays the opposite long side with three windows, the ornate front entryway, and the front porch.
description_view_3: Focuses on the front facade, showcasing the decorative trim, bay windows, main entry steps, and the covered front porch.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a covered porch with decorative columns, ornate trim, steps, and a prominent overhang.
